T02.name: engine-regression-suite
T02.acceptance: PASS: tests/test_vault_regression.py 5 cases green. Locks harness reproduction of EMA_PROX_V4_5M base (n=21/+4935/PF5.66), daily-align (+8114/PF6.96, in vault 5.7->8.1 band), stop-4ATR (n=25/+2828/PF3.88), and EMA_PROX_V0B_5M EXACT vault match (n=40/45%/+4380/PF3.11/maxDD-1248). 15m V4 configs reported pending (not failed). Each assertion names vault id + tolerance.
T02.notes: Tests point at the COMMITTED src/data/*.csv (repo-root-relative, CWD-independent); the top-level data/ dir is untracked so the original path would have failed on a fresh clone — corrected per operator. INTEGRITY FLAGS (operator): (1) V4_5M results-block n=22/total5461/PF16.01/maxDD-212 is STALE vs T01 re-baseline (n=21) and not reproducible by current harness — locked harness output instead, did NOT edit vault. (2) Sharpe convention differs (V0B vault 3.81 vs harness 5.87) — Sharpe excluded from assertions. (3) 15m configs reported pending (baselines not yet calibrated); src/data/MNQ_15m CSV is present. NOTE: src/backtest/drift_control.py DEFAULT_DATA still points at untracked data/ (T07 scope, left untouched).

T04.acceptance: PASS: tests/test_risk.py 18 boundary cases green; exact $50K/$2K/MNQ numbers (98pt/$196 ALLOW 1, 2-lot $392 DOWNSIZE to 1, 100pt boundary, DD/session HALT, daily-align+buffer, max-contracts clamp, FLAT-when-halted). No manager gaps found.

T07.name: drift-control
T07.acceptance: PASS: src/backtest/drift_control.py reproduces the ~0.93 NY_AM-long MFE/MAE drift benchmark (single-seed 0.929 @ H=6 n=500; Monte-Carlo pooled 0.928 / mean 0.934 over 200 seeds). Deterministic (local seeded RNG) + MC multi-seed mode; reuses harness Stats/_stats. tests/test_drift.py 4 cases green.
T07.notes: Buy-and-hold NOT implemented (retired). H=6 (30min) locked as the calibrated NY_AM-long default.

T24.name: ob-nyopen-engine
T24.acceptance: PASS (verification complete): src/engine/ob_nyopen.py implemented faithfully per the OB spec and run through the harness CORRECTLY FALSIFIED the single-entry version -- in-repo n=164/PF0.94/-150.5pt/7-13 green (net LOSER). Operator confirmed the external n=798/PF2.26 was a multiple-re-entry artifact, not reproducible single-entry. OB_NYOPEN_BULL_1M -> FALSIFIED (in-repo numbers are the verified record); re-entry variant spec'd as OB_NYOPEN_REENTRY_1M (SPEC_ONLY). Engine NOT tuned. T24's job was to verify, and it did.
T24.notes: Verification task complete. Single-entry OB falsified; re-entry hypothesis OB_NYOPEN_REENTRY_1M spec'd for a future task (backtest TBD). Engine src/engine/ob_nyopen.py + runner research/task_24_ob_verify.py committed.

T27.name: meanrev-fade-verify
T27.acceptance: PASS (verify): src/engine/meanrev_fade.py through the harness on resampled 2m databento reproduces the operator-external MEANREV_FADE_2M FULL sample near-exactly (in-repo n=191/PF5.06/maxDD-245.5/+8080pt vs external n=192/PF5.07/-246/+8112). Blind earliest-6mo DIVERGES on magnitude (in-repo PF 5.27 n=103 vs claimed 6.98 n=111) -- window-boundary difference, NOT a bug (full match proves engine correct). Blind clears CANDIDATE gate on its own (PF 5.27>1.5, beats drift 0.75, n=103, conc 23%). MEANREV_FADE_2M -> CANDIDATE. Engine NOT tuned.
T27.notes: NOTE: the operator labeled this 'T25', but T25 already exists (ob-walkforward-oos, now moot since OB falsified) -- used the next free id T27 to avoid overwriting. Mean-reversion fade is a NEW family; full-sample verified, blind-PF magnitude flagged as divergent.

T26.name: shock-v1-build
T26.acceptance: PASS: src/engine/shock_v1.py productionizes detection (src/detector/shock.py) + bake-off + impulse-scaled stops + trail/duration/scratch exits. Reproduces backtest_v1: pre-registered k=4.0->3.5 fallback, UP=45/DOWN=53; UP E3 PF 3.60 (n=33, eff_days 28, top3-conc 68%) beats drift 0.77; DOWN all PF<1. Verdict: UP UNDER-POWERED (45<50 gate) stays FINDING; DOWN-continuation FALSIFIED (n=53 adequate). Harness is OHLC-only/long-only so SHOCK driven by its own event loop (documented); drift via harness. Not promoted.
T26.notes: SHOCK_V1 stays FINDING (UP under-powered + 68% concentration; DOWN-continuation falsified). Engine module + runner research/task_p1_shock.py committed.
